$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for cross-process error codes. Rust maps CallError -> code (verified by cargo test against this file); the extension maps its failures to the same codes. `code` is for programmatic handling; the model/user sees `message`.

errors.message: The tool arguments were missing or invalid.
The browser extension is not connected (is it loaded and Chrome running?).
The extension and server protocol versions are incompatible; reload or upgrade the extension.
The extension service worker is not ready yet; retry shortly.
The target origin is not in the user's allowlist.
The extension lacks host permission for the target origin.
This tool is disabled in the extension settings.
The confirmation prompt timed out without a decision.
The target tab could not be found.
The tool cannot run on this page (e.g. chrome://, the Web Store, or a DevTools-attached tab).
The extension executed the operation but it failed.
The message exceeded the native-messaging size limit.
The extension did not respond in time.
The bridge connection was lost while awaiting a response.
